\section*{NAME}
version - get the version of the library

\section*{LIBRARY}
codata (-libcodata, -lcodata)

\section*{SYNOPSIS}
{\ttfamily
version()

}
\section*{DESCRIPTION}
Get the library version.

\section*{RETURN VALUE}
\begin{description}
\item[character(len=:), pointer :: fptr] Pointer to the version as string.
\end{description}

\section*{EXAMPLE}
Minimal example:

\begin{verbatim}
      use codata
      print *, "version = ", version()

\end{verbatim}
\section*{SEE ALSO}
codata(3)
